## Data changes checklist

If this PR modifies any files in `data/`:

- [ ] Every new or changed value has a source URL cited below
- [ ] Sources are from official reports, published papers, or reputable organizations
- [ ] Source publication date is noted
- [ ] `last_updated` date is set to today
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added with date, change description, and source
